message:
fix(grpc,cancel): missing grpc-status defaults to INTERNAL, NaN variance clamp, clippy cleanup

- grpc/web.rs: missing grpc-status trailer header now defaults to Code::INTERNAL (13)
  instead of Code::OK (0). Per gRPC spec, absent status is a protocol violation and
  should not be interpreted as success.
- cancel/progress_certificate.rs: variance calculation NaN from inf-inf overflow now
  clamped to 0.0. f64::max(0.0) doesn't handle NaN per IEEE 754.
- Fix 6 unused variable clippy errors across decoding.rs, distributed/recovery.rs,
  runtime/waker.rs, web/middleware.rs, messaging/jetstream.rs (tracing macro vars).
- plan/fixtures.rs: allow too_many_lines on test helper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
